summary: Closed the round-5 boxing and non-happy-path evidence gaps by making both review and repair bundles fail closed on missing referenced files, removing verdict aliasing, writing run-postmortem.json for zero-round blocked exits, normalizing run-level audit review_mode to a non-null sentinel, and sharing the uniqueStrings helpers through audit-utils.ts.
highlights: Evidence-referenced files are now added to the boxed review bundle automatically and missing required authorities now block the repair bundle.
The shared parser rejects off-contract verdict tokens instead of rewriting them.
Run-level audit and terminal evidence now stay populated on blocked and zero-round exits.
